title: Create transportation booking system with OTP verification and distance-based pricing

requirements.text: Implement OTP generation system that creates a unique 6-digit verification code for each trip booking request

quotes: generating an OTP code can be verified

acceptanceCriteria: Backend generates a random 6-digit OTP code
OTP is stored with an expiration timestamp (5 minutes validity)
Each OTP is associated with a specific booking request

requirements.text: Implement OTP verification system that validates user-entered codes before confirming trip bookings
acceptanceCriteria: Backend accepts OTP input and validates against stored code
Verification checks code match and expiration time
Failed verification returns clear error message
Successful verification marks booking as confirmed

requirements.text: Create trip cost calculation system based on distance traveled and total time taken

quotes: cost and prices are calculated by the details like travelled distance by total time taken

acceptanceCriteria: Backend calculates cost using distance (in kilometers) and time (in minutes)
Pricing formula includes base fare, per-kilometer rate, and per-minute rate
Cost calculation is performed after trip completion
Final price is returned with breakdown of charges

requirements.text: Build trip tracking system that records distance traveled and time duration for each trip

quotes: travelled distance by total time taken

acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores trip start time and end time
Backend records total distance for each trip
Trip data is persisted and associated with booking
Distance and time data are used for cost calculation

requirements.text: Create booking flow interface with OTP input form for trip verification

quotes: generating an OTP code can be verified

acceptanceCriteria: UI displays OTP input field after booking request
Form accepts 6-digit numeric code
Shows loading state during verification
Displays success or error message based on verification result

requirements.text: Build trip details input form capturing distance and time information

quotes: details like travelled distance by total time taken

acceptanceCriteria: Form includes fields for distance traveled (in kilometers)
Form includes fields for time taken (start and end time or duration)
Input validation ensures positive numbers for distance and time
Form submits data to backend for cost calculation

requirements.text: Create cost display component showing price breakdown including distance charges, time charges, and total fare
acceptanceCriteria: UI displays itemized cost breakdown
Shows base fare, distance-based charges, and time-based charges separately
Displays total trip cost prominently
Updates dynamically when trip details change

requirements.text: Design a clean, modern visual theme with transportation-focused aesthetics using warm earth tones and clear typography that emphasizes usability for travel booking interfaces
acceptanceCriteria: Consistent color palette throughout the application
Typography is clear and legible for form inputs and pricing information
Layout feels intuitive for booking and verification workflows
Visual style reflects transportation and travel context

constraints: OTP codes must expire after 5 minutes
Distance must be measured in kilometers
Time must be tracked in minutes
Cost calculation must be transparent with itemized breakdown
nonGoals: Real-time GPS tracking or live location services

required: Hero banner showing modern transportation vehicle on a road with warm sunset lighting (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
Icon representing OTP verification with shield and checkmark design (otp-icon.dim_128x128.png)
Icon showing distance calculation with road and distance marker (distance-icon.dim_128x128.png)
